name: sde-extraction-guard
description: Repo-specific schema guard for SDE_Extraction, hook-enforced: after edits to the extraction surface it runs scripts/check_schema.py and blocks a broken schema (the class of bug that crash-looped the worker). Bundles the recorded-transformation discipline skill. Complements loom-discipline (which handles drift reminders + auto-updating architecture snapshots); this adds the SDE-specific schema validation those generic plugins can't.
